description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push to the master branch, on every pull request to the master branch, and on a scheduled basis at 8am UTC every day. The workflow should have two jobs: one running on macOS 10.15 Catalina and the other on Ubuntu Bionic. Each job should check out the repository, run a setup script specific to the environment, and then run a build and test script specific to the environment.
